hero.title: Magister
hero.subtitle: Cards
hero.body: A collectible art deck born from the author's world of Vasil Pochitsky, where mythology, alchemy, and real historical figures unite in a single alternative universe.

quote.text: These are not cards you simply play with. They are artifacts — each one carries a world within it, waiting to be understood.

gallery.label: The Collection
gallery.title: Figures of the Deck
gallery.hint: Hover to reveal. Click to enter.

artist.name: Vasil Pochitsky
artist.quote: I wanted to create a world that could exist in parallel with our own — where myth and history blend into something truer than either.
artist.process_body_1: Each card is a carefully researched window into a parallel universe where mythology, alchemy, and history coexist. The deck is both an art object and a playable game.
artist.process_body_2: The illustrations draw on deep research into historical figures, mythological archetypes, and alchemical symbolism — woven together into a coherent alternative world.

acquire.label: The Complete Deck
acquire.title: Acquire your edition
acquire.subtitle: Each deck is a numbered collectible art object.
acquire.fine_print: Cards are packed with care and shipped worldwide. Each deck is individually numbered.

footer.tagline: An art deck for those who prefer their worlds layered, their history alternative, and their cards carrying meaning.
footer.copy: © 2024 Magister Cards · All illustrations by Vasil Pochitsky
